---
name: Handoff feedback
about: Tell us when a handover.md was missing something the next LLM needed
labels: feedback
---

**What was the task / session about?**

(brief description — no need to paste full context)

**What was missing or wrong in the handover.md?**

(what did the next LLM not know, or get wrong because of an incomplete section?)

**Which section was the problem?**

- [ ] Original request
- [ ] Session goal / scope
- [ ] Repository state
- [ ] Progress (completed / in progress)
- [ ] Files in play
- [ ] Key decisions + WHY
- [ ] Failed approaches
- [ ] Blockers
- [ ] Next steps
- [ ] Critical context
- [ ] Environment
- [ ] Other: ___

**How was the handover triggered?**

- [ ] Manual (`/llm-handoff`)
- [ ] Auto (PreCompact hook — Claude Code)
- [ ] Auto (PreCompact hook — Codex)
- [ ] Auto (PreCompress hook — Gemini CLI, snapshot only)

**Previous LLM / tool**

(e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6 in Claude Code)

**Next LLM / tool**

(e.g. gpt-4o in ChatGPT)

**Suggested fix**

(what should the skill capture that it didn't?)
